title: Motivational Speeches
description: a Mod that motivates you by showing motivational quotes.
body:
**This Mod motivates you by showing motivational quotes when you're in a game.**






## What features does this mod add?

This Mod adds a quote at the top of your screen that changes every 30 seconds, but if you already feel motivated. Press Right Shift on your keyboard to open the configuration to toggle the quotes.







## Why you should get this mod?

If you ever feel like you're not motivated to do something, then **Motivational Speeches** is here for you.
